hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase leading-none text-text_primary

motion_and_interactions.scroll_timeline: GSAP ScrollTrigger pinned timeline (scrub: true). Sequence: 1. Hero wordmark overlays the canvas. 2. Scroll: Product zooms into center viewport. 3. Scroll: 360-degree rotation of product and transition right. 4. Specs panel fades in on the left side.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Floating HTML circular/square elements or R3F particles in background moving at different speeds mapped to scroll.
motion_and_interactions.fire_interaction: Clicking FIRE button triggers an animated water stream (R3F Instances/Sparkles) from the gun nozzle AND a flickering orange PointLight at the nozzle. Resets after 2-3 seconds.
motion_and_interactions.button_hover: Scale-up slightly (scale-105), background changes to darker accent, adds drop-shadow-lg.

three_d_scene.lighting: Studio lighting: AmbientLight (intensity 1), strong DirectionalLight (white) to highlight the tactical body.
three_d_scene.model: Use the provided GLB 3D model (MP5K-UTG Electric Water Gun). Ensure transparent drum magazine material renders correctly.
three_d_scene.effects: Water blast uses R3F (blue/white particles). Muzzle flash uses PointLight with rapid intensity flickering.

image_urls.description: Optional background texture for water splash or UI accents
Water drops for macro detailing or feature sections

components.name: HeroOverlay
components.description: HTML absolute positioned overlay with 'MP5K-UTG' wordmark.

components.name: CanvasContainer
components.description: Full-screen fixed layout for the R3F Canvas.

components.name: ScrollContainer
components.description: Tall invisible container driving ScrollTrigger progress.

components.name: SpecsPanel
components.description: HTML container on left side fading in at the end of scroll. Contains specs list and Fire button.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a single-page app in React (.js) combining HTML overlay layers and a fixed R3F Canvas. Use GSAP ScrollTrigger to pin the canvas container and animate the model (zoom, 360-spin, settle right). The 'FIRE' button triggers R3F particles and an animated PointLight at the nozzle. Use the exact provided GLB model.
